_comment_parade_agent: Optional first responder for operator messages on parade slides. Busy/unavailable falls back to cos_agent; empty routes directly to cos_agent.
_comment_alpha_xo: Optional harness-portable trial: project-XO with explicit surface codex (see docs/coordinator-seat-swap-runbook.md). Not live by default — supervised trial gate applies.
_comment_beta_xo: Optional harness-portable trial: project-XO with explicit surface grok (see docs/coordinator-seat-swap-runbook.md). Not live by default — supervised trial gate applies.
_comment_adjutant: Optional coordinator adjutant (#439): example seats only — not live until pilot gate. Requires change_detector + liveness_ping_mode interval|consecutive (not none). stackable_wakes (phase 2) defaults false. Operator-loop adjutants need FLOTILLA_WEBHOOK_<ADJ> in secrets + FLOTILLA_SECRETS on launch (#628); see llm.md §6.
_comment_xo_rotate: Optional idle-edge rotate policy (#467): always (default) | never | handoff. FLOTILLA_XO_ROTATE env overrides. never/handoff suppress bare /clear on continueXO; handoff-gated recycle is #443.
_comment_usage_limit: Usage-limit downgrade policy (#466) lives in the HOST-LOCAL launch recipe (primary + fallbacks[] per agent), NOT in this committable roster. See flotilla-launch.example.json + docs/usage-limit-resilience.md.
_comment_coordinator: Optional per-agent coordinator rank (#491): coordinator:true opts a seat in; coordinator:false opts an execution desk out even when supervisor-as-member topology would infer span. Absent = infer from bindings. Primary xo_agent/cos_agent cannot set false.
_comment_primary_repo: Optional authority domain (Track C): primary_repo is canonical owner/name git identity (NOT a filesystem path). Optional secondary_repos[] are extra domains (lines 2+ in worktree/.gatekeeper/domain). A domain deliberately having no repository-backed work declares work_ledger_repositoryless:true; absence instead remains a missing ledger mapping. Optional worktree_path links the desk home (absolute host path; existence not checked at load). workspace init/resume materialize .gatekeeper/domain for the merge-domain hook (consume contract only). All optional for backward compatibility. See openspec/changes/authority-domains-org-chart/.
_comment_channels: Federation bindings (the real product topology). EACH agent OWNS its home channel and lists its PARENT in members[] — so awareness rolls UP the graph. The ONE exception is the fleet-command BROADCAST channel (role=fleet-command), whose members are the meta-XO's command targets, NOT synthesis parents; it is EXCLUDED from visibility-synthesis routing + the load-time acyclicity check. An untagged broadcast channel forms a synthesis cycle and Load fail-closed refuses it. A single-XO fleet can drop channels[] entirely and use the legacy channel_id form.
_comment_schedules: Daemon-native daily wall-clock dispatch (flotilla#413). Each at MUST include an explicit timezone (e.g. 12:07Z). Prompt may be inline or a host-local file path (preferred for long prompts). Durable last-fired state: <roster-dir>/flotilla-schedule-state.json.
